title: US-Iran War LIVE: At least 10 explosions heard over Jerusalem as Israel engages Iranian missiles
content:
At least 10 explosions were heard over Jerusalem.
*   The explosions occurred as Israel engaged incoming Iranian missiles.
*   The incident is taking place within a broader "US-Iran War" live context.

title: Bengaluru renter calls out landlord’s strict exit rules: 'Bro, it’s a 1BHK, not pre-launch audit for ISRO'
content:
A Bengaluru renter publicly criticized their landlord for imposing excessively strict rules for vacating an apartment.
*   The renter sarcastically compared the move-out inspection process for their 1BHK (one-bedroom, hall, kitchen) apartment to a "pre-launch audit for ISRO."
*   The comment highlights the renter's frustration over perceived unreasonable and disproportionate demands for vacating a small property.

title: RBI defers implementation of amendment directions on capital market exposures by three months to July 1
content:
The Reserve Bank of India (RBI) has postponed the implementation of its amendment directions.
*   These directions specifically pertain to capital market exposures.
*   The deferral extends the implementation period by three months, setting the new effective date as July 1.

title: No change in interest rates on small savings schemes
content:
Here's the summary in 3 bullet points:

*   Interest rates on various small savings schemes have been kept unchanged.
*   The government has decided to maintain the current rates.
*   Savers will continue to earn interest at the existing levels from these schemes.

title: India's April-February fiscal deficit at 80% of 2025/26 target
content:
India has reported its fiscal deficit for the April-February period.
*   The deficit has already reached 80% of the target set for the fiscal year 2025/26.
*   This indicates the country is significantly close to its future deficit target with much of the current fiscal year having already passed.

title: Government clears 29 investment proposals worth ₹7,104 cr under Electronics Component Manufacturing Scheme
content:
The government has approved 29 new investment proposals.
*   These proposals collectively represent an investment worth ₹7,104 crore.
*   The approvals were made under the Electronics Component Manufacturing Scheme.

title: Sustained war in Iran depletes high-end missile stocks of US
content:
A sustained war is currently taking place in Iran.
*   This ongoing conflict is leading to the depletion of missile stocks.
*   Specifically, the United States' high-end missile inventories are being affected.
